name: ai-zippy-child/home-services
title: Home Services
description: Core services grid section for the homepage.

cardOneText.default: Premium raw teak and timber planks sourced sustainably for construction, joinery, and interior finishing projects.

cardTwoText.default: Precision wood cutting and milling services tailored to your exact dimensions and project requirements.

cardThreeText.default: Indoor and outdoor decking solutions including solid teak E4E, T&G profiles, and WPC composite systems.

cardFourText.default: Dedicated wholesale services for interior designers, contractors, and trade professionals with volume pricing.

cardFiveText.default: Expert wood grading expertise helping you select the right material grade for every application and budget.

cardSixText.default: Reliable supply and distribution across Singapore and regional markets from our Sungei Kadut base.
